rationale: No direct conflict. §26.0501 limits defunding municipalities' tax rates. Increasing the homestead exemption affects taxable value calculations feeding into no-new-revenue and voter-approval rates, requiring rulemaking updates to calculation worksheets, but no statutory amendment to §26.0501 is needed.
quote: the governing body of a defunding municipality may not adopt a tax rate for the current tax year that exceeds the lesser of the defunding municipality's no-new-revenue tax rate or voter-approval tax rate for that tax year.
_note: Indirect interaction only: changed exemption amount alters taxable value inputs used in rate calculations referenced by §26.0501(b)–(c); no operative conflict with the defunding municipality limitation itself.
